Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Explicit current portion of long-term debt and excludes leases; unique and directly matches STD semantics.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit current maturities debt line because it uniquely identifies short-term debt excluding leases. There is also a duplicated row label 'Borrowings' in the current liabilities section, but the duplicate label makes it ambiguous in this output format whether that refers to current or non-current borrowings across years.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Intangible asset contra account, not PPE.

variables.notes: No single total/net PPE row is visible on the balance sheet. PPE appears split into components such as 'Land and buildings' and 'Equipment', while 'Right-of-use assets' is separate and lease-related. Manual review needed to determine the intended aggregation for total PPE.
